findings.description: The URL for the DEQ Laserfiche database is present in the HTML but not rendered as a clickable hyperlink, whereas the PDF version shows it as a hyperlink. Similarly, the email addresses (lonnavines@cmlibrary.org, shirley.liggins@deq.nc.gov) are plain text in the HTML but appear as links in the PDF.
findings.evidence: PDF has clickable links for 'https://edocs.deq.nc.gov/WasteManagement/' and 'shirley.liggins@deq.nc.gov'. HTML renders these as plain text without <a> tags.

findings.description: The HTML contains nested <main> elements, which is structurally incorrect but does not cause visible content duplication. The page footer identifier '25095-21-060/Colwick Road Property/202500925' appears in the HTML footer, matching the PDF header/footer, so this is acceptable.
findings.evidence: HTML has <main> inside <main>. This is a structural issue but does not result in duplicated visible content.
